items.name: click-powerup
items.title: ClickPowerUp
items.description: An animated button wrapper with corner brackets, patterned fill, and tap feedback.

items.name: sticky
items.title: StickyButton
items.description: A magnetic button that follows cursor movement with spring physics.

items.name: shiny-button
items.title: ShinyButton
items.description: A glossy, gradient-styled button with a layered inner glow and press feedback.

items.name: movie-pass
items.title: MoviePassButton
items.description: A ticket-style button like a cinema stub.

items.name: minimal
items.title: MinimalButton
items.description: A sleek, minimal button with a subtle repeating linear gradient pattern.

items.name: grid-button
items.title: GridButton
items.description: A retro-styled button with a pixelated grid icon and tactile press feedback.

items.name: dither-button
items.title: DitherButton
items.description: A button with an animated 4x4 ordered-dither wave background and a knockout label.

items.name: evil-eye-button
items.title: EvilEyeButton
items.description: A button with a React Bits evil eye shader background and a fiery readable label.

items.name: troll-button
items.title: TrollButton
items.description: A button that flees from the user's cursor.

items.name: chrome-button
items.title: ChromeButton
items.description: A button with an animated liquid chrome background.

items.name: brutal-button
items.title: BrutalButton
items.description: A NeoBrutalism style button with sharp shadows and stark borders.

items.name: aqua-button
items.title: AquaButton
items.description: A glossy pill button inspired by Apple's Aqua interface, with layered highlights and a soft inner glow.

items.name: 3d-button
items.title: ThreeDButton
items.description: A minimal 3D button with a clean deck-style press and sliding click sheen.

items.name: frame-button
items.title: FrameButton
items.description: A futuristic button with animated corner frames and tactile motion interactions.

items.name: highlight-button
items.title: HighlightButton
items.description: A button with a mouse-following highlight that darkens light surfaces and expands on click.

items.name: glitch-button
items.title: GlitchButton
items.description: A button with randomized RGB-split glitch bursts, a scanline overlay, and a flickering label.

items.name: command-button
items.title: CommandButton
items.description: A button that binds a keyboard shortcut globally and pulses with a subtle flash animation when the shortcut fires.

items.name: copy-button
items.title: CopyButton
items.description: A button that copies a value to the clipboard and transitions through idle, copied, and error states with animated icon swaps.

items.name: reveal-button
items.title: RevealButton
items.description: A button that reveals a hidden secret value on hold or toggle, with a blur-in animation and an eye icon indicator.

items.name: demonic-button
items.title: DemonicButton
items.description: A hold-to-charge button: keep pressing to slowly strain the devil horns out while it trembles, spits embers, and flashes between black and blood-red like a filling life meter.

items.name: hold-button
items.title: HoldButton
items.description: A hold-to-confirm button whose inner fill grows from 0 to 100%; release early to shake and abort, hold to the end to fire the action.

items.name: captcha-button
items.title: CaptchaButton
items.description: A button that makes you pass an absurd 'select all the evil' emoji captcha before the real action fires.

items.name: doubt-button
items.title: DoubtButton
items.description: An escalating-confirmation button that makes you click through increasingly absurd, guilt-tripping prompts before the real action finally fires.

items.name: slide-to-detonate
items.title: SlideToDetonate
items.description: A slide-to-confirm safety gate that makes you drag a handle across a fuse before the real action detonates.

items.name: morph-status-button
items.title: MorphStatusButton
items.description: A single button that morphs through idle, loading, success, and error states in place, with no layout shift.

items.name: cooldown-button
items.title: CooldownButton
items.description: A button that locks itself behind a draining radial timer after each click to stop spam and double-submits, taunting you while you wait.
